'''Aragon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elder (Melodie)|Elder]] of the [[Melodie]] species who lived on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]] around [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].

==Biography==
Aragon was the oldest [[Melodie]] in [[Sistra Mountain]] and the community's "[[Keeper of Legends|keeper of legends]]," which he inherited from his mother [[Esla|Elsa]]. Due to his age, Aragon was not able to surface at all and lived in underwater caverns deep in Sistra. He had long white hair and yellow eyes.

He assisted the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] during their journey in the underwater caverns of Sistra by providing them with information about the [[Golden Globe]]'s origins. Aragon told them that the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] came to the moon in [[3997 BBY]] to ask for help in freeing their trapped children from the Golden Globe, which had been constructed by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] during his tyrannical reign over the Massassi species for the sole purpose of draining the life energies of its captives. Since the Melodies were unable to help, they left messages engraved on the rocks and tunnels of the moon so that someone might be able to read them and break the curse.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}}
